name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Resource Creation Events
notes: This rule triggers when components are created under critical namespaces, such as kube-system or kube-public. The namespace kube-system should only be used by objects created from Kubernetes system. The namespace kube-public is readable by all users, which must be used with caution.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Resource Creation Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers

when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Network Peering Success, Authentication.Access Key Creation Success, Authentication.Role Creation Success, Authentication.Role Assignment Success, Audit.Machine Creation Success, System.Task Creation Success, System.Cron Successful, Audit.Configure Activity Succeeded
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Resource Creation Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Network Peering Success, Authentication.Access Key Creation Success, Authentication.Role Creation Success, Authentication.Role Assignment Success, Audit.Machine Creation Success, System.Task Creation Success, System.Cron Successful, Audit.Configure Activity Succeeded
